panels.title: Current WIP per Assignee (Issues In Progress)
panels.description: Open issues currently in progress per person. Useful for spotting overload.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(assignee, 'Unassigned') AS "Assignee", COUNT(*) AS "Issues", COALESCE(SUM(story_points), 0) AS "Story Points" FROM issues WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND status_category = 'In Progress' GROUP BY assignee ORDER BY "Issues" DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Avg Cycle Time (RFT → Done) per Assignee
panels.description: Average hours from Ready For Testing to Done per assignee, over the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT i.assignee AS "Assignee", ROUND(AVG(c.hours_rft_to_done)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Hours", ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY c.hours_rft_to_done)::numeric, 1) AS "Median Hours", COUNT(*) AS "Issues" FROM v_cycle_time_rft_to_done c JOIN issues i ON i.key = c.issue_key WHERE c.project_key IN ($project) AND i.assignee IS NOT NULL AND c.hours_rft_to_done > 0 AND date_trunc('quarter', c.resolved_at) = '$quarter'::date GROUP BY i.assignee HAVING AVG(c.hours_rft_to_done) > 0 ORDER BY "Avg Hours" DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Issues Completed per Assignee
panels.description: Issues resolved per person over the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(assignee, 'Unassigned') AS "Assignee", COUNT(*) AS "Completed", COALESCE(SUM(story_points), 0) AS "Story Points" FROM issues WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND status_category = 'Done' AND resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND date_trunc('quarter', resolved_at) = '$quarter'::date GROUP BY assignee ORDER BY "Completed" DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Where Issues Spend the Most Time (Avg Hours per Status)
panels.description: Average hours issues remain in each status. Long waits in review/testing statuses indicate bottlenecks.

targets.rawSql: SELECT status AS "Status", ROUND(AVG(hours_in_status)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Hours", ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY hours_in_status)::numeric, 1) AS "Median Hours", COUNT(*) AS "Samples" FROM v_time_in_status WHERE issue_key IN (SELECT key FROM issues WHERE project_key IN ($project)) AND hours_in_status IS NOT NULL AND hours_in_status > 0 AND hours_in_status < 8760 GROUP BY status HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY "Avg Hours" DESC LIMIT 15

panels.title: Issues Completed per Assignee Over Time (weekly)

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', resolved_at) AS time, assignee AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM issues WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND status_category = 'Done' AND resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND assignee IS NOT NULL AND date_trunc('quarter', resolved_at) = '$quarter'::date GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Assignee Detail — Selected Period
panels.description: Per-person summary: issues completed, story points delivered, and avg cycle time. Filtered by selected quarter, or last 90 days when All is selected.

targets.rawSql: SELECT i.assignee AS "Assignee", COUNT(DISTINCT i.key) AS "Issues Completed", COALESCE(SUM(i.story_points), 0) AS "Points Delivered", COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN i.issue_type = 'Bug' THEN i.key END) AS "Bugs Fixed", ROUND(AVG(c.hours_rft_to_done)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Cycle Time (h)", COUNT(DISTINCT wip.key) AS "Current WIP" FROM issues i LEFT JOIN v_cycle_time_rft_to_done c ON c.issue_key = i.key AND date_trunc('quarter', c.resolved_at) = '$quarter'::date LEFT JOIN issues wip ON wip.assignee = i.assignee AND wip.status_category = 'In Progress' WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.status_category = 'Done' AND date_trunc('quarter', i.resolved_at) = '$quarter'::date AND i.assignee IS NOT NULL GROUP BY i.assignee ORDER BY "Issues Completed" DESC

list.name: project
list.label: Team / Project
list.query: SELECT key FROM projects ORDER BY key

list.name: quarter
list.label: Quarter
list.query: SELECT CONCAT('Q', EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM created_at)::int, ' ', EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_at)::int) AS __text, TO_CHAR(date_trunc('quarter', created_at), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS __value FROM issues WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 2 DESC
